rulings.Case Title: ERIC KASTELL et al VS. SALVADOR CHAVEZ et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, February 4, 2011, line 1, CROSS-COMPLAINANT SALVADOR CHAVEZ MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. COURT GRANTS DEFENDANT'S MOTON FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AS TO THE INTENTIONAL AND NEGLIGENT MISREPRESENTATION CAUSE OF ACTION. PLAINTIFF ALSO CANNOT ESTABLISH JUSTIFIABLE RELIANCE. ACCORDINGLY, THE COURT GRANTS DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. =(302/LMG)
